summary: Iteration 69 - PayID Refresh, Round Bracket Note Stripping, Barrister View Parser. All 22 tests PASSED. Verified: AdminDashboard PayID refresh button with data-testid, loading state, and error toasts; ReportView/BarristerView cleanAIContent strips round bracket notes (Note:, Link formatting, Entries will); BarristerView parseAnalysis detects markdown headings and numbered all-caps headings; cleanTitle helper strips leading numbers; section filtering threshold is 80 chars; CaseDetail print buttons on all tabs with iOS iframe approach.

issues: Console warnings about Missing Description for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue (pre-existing)

success_rate.backend: 100% - Health endpoint working, login API working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 verified all requested features via code review and pytest. PayID refresh button has proper data-testid, loading state, and error toasts. Round bracket note stripping implemented in both ReportView and BarristerView cleanAIContent functions. BarristerView parseAnalysis now detects markdown headings (## Title) and numbered all-caps headings (5. COMPARATIVE SENTENCING TABLE). cleanTitle helper strips leading numbers from section titles. Section filtering threshold is 80 chars. Print buttons exist on all 7 tabs in CaseDetail with iOS iframe approach. Cannot test admin PayID endpoint as we don't know the admin password.
